name: Valle del Cauca (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the Pacific Ocean and the sky over the Cauca valley
the peace and integrity of the people of the valley

description: Two equal horizontal stripes, light blue over white.
history: Valle del Cauca was created as a department in 1910 from the territory south of the Cauca River. Its bicolour flag of light blue over white represents the Pacific coast and the rivers of the fertile valley.
